About Me

10+ years building technology solutions.

  • ✔ Linux & Windows Administration
  • ✔ Servers & VPS
  • ✔ Networking
  • ✔ Hardware Diagnostics
  • ✔ Technical Support
  • ✔ Web Infrastructure
  • ✔ AI Assisted Workflow

Experience

SolarisPKN

2015 - Present

Technology venture specialized in IT support, computer maintenance, and repair for individuals and businesses. Experience in Linux server administration, network infrastructure, system optimization, remote access solutions, custom cooling prototypes for high-performance computers, technology consulting, product sales, and brand management.

Lubricantes Villars

2018 - Present

Diagnosis and troubleshooting of automotive electrical, electronic, and computerized systems. Experience using automotive diagnostic scanners, interpreting fault codes, analyzing sensors, actuators and control modules, repairing electrical systems, and providing technical assistance to customers.

TheZapas

2021 - 2022

Technology infrastructure administrator for an e-commerce platform. Linux (Debian) server administration, remote management via SSH, web service configuration and optimization, infrastructure monitoring, performance tuning, and technical SEO improvements.
